body.purpose: Thai body copy, controls, labels, and metadata.

shadows.name: lifted-panel
shadows.purpose: Command palette and floating navigation only.

motion.name: ease-atlas
motion.purpose: Short state transitions and directional feedback.

components.name: Primary Action
components.description: The single strongest action in a learning context.
components.html: <button class="ds-primary">เริ่มเส้นทางเรียน</button>

components.name: Chapter Marker
components.description: Marks the ordered textbook sections within every lesson.

components.name: Atlas Search
components.description: Searches phenomena, places, and concepts across the atlas.
components.css: .ds-search{display:grid;gap:6px;color:#53625D;font:600 12px 'Noto Sans Thai',sans-serif}.ds-search input{min-height:46px;border:1px solid #CAD2CC;border-radius:6px;padding:0 14px;background:#fff;color:#172521;font:400 15px 'Noto Sans Thai',sans-serif}.ds-search input:focus{outline:3px solid #D9A441;outline-offset:2px}

narrative.northStar: โต๊ะทำงานของนักสำรวจโลก
narrative.overview: A contemporary atlas desk combining field notes, satellite evidence, maps, and reference-book typography. Every interaction moves the learner from curiosity to evidence and from overview to mechanism.

rules.name: Evidence Color Rule
rules.body: Saturated color must identify a category, state, or data relationship.

rules.name: Flat Atlas Rule
rules.body: Lesson surfaces stay flat; shadows indicate actual elevation.

dos: Give every image a caption or observation prompt.
Use one complete textbook structure for every lesson.
Separate process models from real-place evidence.
donts: Do not make a childlike learning site or an unguided card warehouse.
Do not create academic walls of text.
Do not use neon, glassmorphism, gradient text, or decorative imagery without evidence.
